data.raceName: PLACE SRM WITH BET NATION 5TH GRADE HT1
data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. BRIDGE UP BABY hasn't been far away, finishing in the money twice in a row including last time in a Grade 5 at this track over 380m. Can make amends this time. 5. RAYMAR FOX turned in a moderate performance last time when seventh at this track over 380m behind White Car (22.71) in a Restricted WIN. Cannot be taken lightly. 1. SMOKING ACE turned in a plain run last time when sixth at this track over 380m behind Aussie Audi (22.75) in a Grade 5. The form out of his last race has been franked. Better than last start and can bounce back. 7. BULLEMOR BANNER has top-three aspirations after placing at big odds last time.","runners":[3,5,1,7],"exclusive":false}
